memberdef.argsstring: (std::string sm="Weibel", amrex::IntVect n_cell_vector={AMREX_D_DECL(24, 8, 8)}, amrex::GpuArray< int, numspec > n_part_per_cell_in={100}, int NS=10, int FX=12, int FV=12, int FS=12, amrex::IntVect is_periodic_vector={AMREX_D_DECL(1, 1, 1)}, amrex::IntVect max_grid_size_vector={AMREX_D_DECL(4, 4, 4)}, amrex::Real DT=0.02, amrex::GpuArray< amrex::Real, numspec > C={-1.0}, amrex::GpuArray< amrex::Real, numspec > M={1.0}, amrex::Real K=1.25, amrex::GpuArray< std::string, numspec > wf={"1.0"}, std::string BX="0.0", std::string BY="0.0", std::string BZ="1e-3 * cos(kvarx * x)", std::string EX="0.0", std::string EY="0.0", std::string EZ="1e-3 * cos(kvarx * x)", std::string PHI="4 * 0.5 * cos(0.5 * x)", amrex::GpuArray< int, numspec > NG={1}, int PROP=0, amrex::Real TOL_P=1.e-10, int MAX_C=30, int RST=0, std::string CF="", int CD=0, amrex::Vector< amrex::Vector< amrex::Vector< amrex::Real >>> meanVelocity_in={{{0.0, 0.0, 0.0}}}, amrex::Vector< amrex::Vector< amrex::Vector< amrex::Real >>> vThermal_in={{{0.014142135623730949, 0.04898979485566356, 0.04898979485566356}}}, amrex::Vector< amrex::Vector< amrex::Real >> vWeight_in={{1.0}})
memberdef.name: set_params

memberdef.argsstring: (std::string sim_name_in="Weibel", int propagatorIn=3, int nStepsIn=10, amrex::IntVect nCellIn={AMREX_D_DECL(12, 8, 8)}, amrex::Array< int, numspec > nPartPerCellIn={100}, amrex::Real dtIn=0.02, int freqSliceIn=100)
memberdef.name: set_params_Weibel
